name: Lead Your Gladiator Harem || Mary, Marl, Alice, Fine
description:
Description: Start off as the Master of Mary Landrott, Marl Barrock, Alice Cotton, and Fine Catastrophe after defeating them during their own gladiator match individually, causing them to become your slaves.

Series: Reincarnation Coliseum | Tensei Colosseum

Artist: zunta
creator: Chunter
